notes: SHIP v1.14.344 - restore the AI ASSISTANT card's function (owner). #pg-cmd-scoped markup+CSS -> ?legacy byte-identical; joins the .340-.344 batch device-verify. Owner: the assistant card became decorative-only in the FINAL-LOOK ships; tapping it must open the actual assistant surface - the SAME existing door the old Ask-for-assistance tile / the desktop CHAT WITH PHANTOM button use (openVaSheet). Whole card is the tap target (gloved-hand rule) with a visible affordance so it reads as tappable (a 'CHAT ->' chip in the card corner). No new assistant logic - reuse the existing surface + its own close/return. Implementation: #cc-asst (was a plain decorative <div>, no handler) now carries role=button tabindex=0 aria-label + onclick=openVaSheet() - matching the existing rd tap pattern (.route / .stat.cc-tap). openVaSheet() with no arg is the exact call the desktop CHAT WITH PHANTOM button already uses (@ the #cc-chat button, onclick=openVaSheet()) - one canonical door, two affordances (NOT a one-door violation; both hit openVaSheet). Added a 'CHAT ->' chip: markup .cc-asst-chatrow > .cc-asst-chat (aria-hidden, decorative - the whole card is the actual target, taps bubble to it); CSS .cc-asst-chatrow{clear:both;text-align:right} drops the chip below the floated ghost into the card's bottom-right corner (no collision), cyan-outline chip (cyan = the assistant's in-app identity), + .cc-asst:active brightens the chip & border for gloved feedback. .cc-asst also gets cursor:pointer. On phone the desktop CHAT WITH PHANTOM button is display:none, so the card tap is the sole door (the restoration owner asked for); on desktop both exist, both open the same sheet. Zero JS logic added - openVaSheet + its close/return are untouched. Gates: inline-JS vm.Script x3 (no function changed - a new onclick attr + a decorative element only), CSS brace net-0, sw.js ok, version.json valid, three-stamp .343->.344; phantom-ship-gate + phantom-rd-reviewer pre-commit. DEVICE-VERIFY (hard-refresh / clear SW first): on Home, tapping ANYWHERE on the AI ASSISTANT card opens the Phantom assistant sheet (same as before the FINAL-LOOK ships); the 'CHAT ->' chip shows in the card's bottom-right; the sheet's own close returns to Home. ?legacy=1 pixel-identical. Batch item: verify with .340-.343. NEXT = web-Claude FIX-DESKTOP-NAV-CARDS.md desktop-shell ship (S1 full-width bottom nav strip / S2 desktop nav-clearance / S3 .cc-rackhero + DEVICES straggler / S4 lock-safe hero brightness). ROLLBACK: revert this commit.
